user_message: Can you extract the executive brief from this support ticket for VanArsdel Ltd? I met with them last week but can't remember the details.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Karen Patel <karen.patel@vanarsdelltd.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-25 16:00 EST
Subject: executive brief - Action Required

There's been a change in our timeline for executive brief. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Karen Patel <karen.patel@vanarsdelltd.com>
Date: 2024-02-18 12:19 EST
Subject: Re: Re: executive brief Timeline

Just checking in on the executive brief proposal. Our CTO is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

signals.detail: Signal detected for VanArsdel Ltd: the cost projections need to factor in reserved instance pricing for accuracy

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF42-C trap (Ownership routed to wrong role (CSA vs DSSP vs partner)); produces complete Signal assessment, opportunity hypothesis with confidence, ownership routing, response draft, next-s
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF42-C failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF42-C failure mode (Ownership routed to wrong role (CSA vs DSSP vs partner))
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct executive brief decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF42-C -- Ownership routed to wrong role (CSA vs DSSP vs partner)
